text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:47:45 2014

URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350307
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350307/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188106
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-WebService-IMDB/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-WebService-IMDB/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-WebService-IMDB/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:40 2014	(r350306)
+++ head/www/p5-WebService-IMDB/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:45 2014	(r350307)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl interface to IMDb
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Cache-Cache>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Cache-Cache \
 		p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
 		p5-DateTime>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime \
